query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS service_disclaimers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  disclaimer_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  short_text TEXT NOT NULL,
  full_text TEXT NOT NULL,
  requires_acknowledgment BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  display_on_documents BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS disclaimer_acknowledgments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  disclaimer_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  service_type VARCHAR(50),
  invoice_id INT,
  document_id INT,
  acknowledged_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  ip_address VARCHAR(45),
  user_agent TEXT,
  electronic_signature TEXT
);
